content: We can leverage cosine similarity-based case matching to tailor the personalized cognitive training workouts of Reflexion to individual patient needs after SCINTIX radiotherapy for lung or bone tumors. Patients post-therapy often have heterogeneous cognitive impairments from tumor-related neurological effects or treatment side effects; matching a new patient’s cognitive profile to the most cosine-similar past patient cases lets clinicians select the Reflexion training regimen that has historically yielded the best cognitive recovery outcomes for similar presentations.
